seo.title: About Us | TypeScript CMS Example
seo.description: Learn about the TypeScript CMS example project and how it works.

props.title: Built with TypeScript
props.text: TypeScript CMS generates fully typed content modules from simple JSON config files. Edit content in the admin panel and see changes reflected instantly in your app through live preview.

props.title: Framework Agnostic
props.text: Works with React, Next.js, Vue, and Nuxt. The same CMS config files and admin panel work across all frameworks — just change the framework option in your build config.

props.title: Ready to try it?
props.subtitle: Get started with TypeScript CMS in minutes
